title: ACADIA Q1 2026: Revenue Rises 11% Despite Earnings Miss
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Metrics: Total Q1 2026 revenue: $268.1 million, representing 11% year-over-year growth. Full-year 2026 guidance maintained: $1.22-$1.28 billion. Earnings Miss: Reported earnings per share of $0.02 fell significantly short of analyst expectations of $0.05. Product-Specific Results: DAYBUE: Q1 net sales: $101.2 million (20% YoY growth). New DAYBUE STIX formulation generated over 250 prescriptions in Q1. NUPLAZID: Q1 net sales: $166.9 million (6% growth on adjusted basis). Underlying demand grew 8% YoY with 11% referral growth. Company targets approximately $1 billion in NUPLAZID sales by 2028. Expense Analysis: SG&A expenses surged 35% to $171.0 million. R&D expenses declined modestly by 2% to $76.9 million. Financial Position: Cash and investments totaled $851.5 million.
